comments.comment:
As requested, I have re-calculated ad confirmed our reported numbers for Arsenic in waste rock.

2019
Avg As Concentration (PPM): 47.36
Total Tonnes of Waste Rock Mined: 128094
Total Tonnes As from Waste Rock: 5.298

2020
Avg As Concentration (PPM): 31.81
Total Tonnes of Waste Rock Mined: 390578.4
Total Tonnes As from Waste Rock: 12.426

2019 Vs. 2020 Percent Differences
Avg As Con (PPM) was 32.83% lower in 2020
Total Tonnes of Waste Rock Mined was 304.9% higher in 2020
Total Tonnes of Arsenic from Waste Rock was 234.5% higher in 2020

The higher total amount of Arsenic from Waste Rock in 2020 was a direct result of increased waste rock mining and production ramp ups.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: We did not recycle this substance in 2020

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment:
As requested, I have re-calculated and confirmed our reported numbers for Manganese in direct discharges to water.

2019
Avg Mn Concentration (mg/L): 0.0488
Total Discharge (m3): 14572225.41
Tonnes Mn Discharged: 0.7435

2020
Avg Mn Concentration (mg/L): 0.0598
Total Discharge (m3): 16430247.64
Tonnes Mn Discharged: 1.015

2019 Vs. 2020 Percent Differences
Avg Mn Concentration (mg/L) was 22.5% higher in 2020
Total water discharged (m3) was 112.7% higher in 2020
Tonnes of Mn discharged was 136.5% higher in 2020

The increased amount of manganese discharged to water is a direct cause of significant increase of production. During 2020 our water treatment system was also nearing to a point of significant maintenance being needed. During this time our water treatment system was not operating at its full potential.
